extortion.description: [AI generated] Primal Wear, Inc. is a US-based company, founded in 1992, widely known for producing high-quality cycling apparel. They offer a broad range of cycling gear including jerseys, shorts, outerwear, and accessories for both men and women. Primal Wear specializes in advanced fabrics and innovative designs, focusing on comfort and performance enhancement. They advocate for cycling through partnerships with various events and organizations.
